content:
An overview of Horla in two minutes. Usually these are 60ish seconds, but Horla is more complex than the average Awakener.
https://youtube.com/shorts/G-YasNwcgzI?si=-PkKAllSOUESl0Qx

embeds.title: Morimens: Horla Overview #morimens #animehorrorgame #lovecraftianho...
embeds.description:
"Rose's spike pierces the poetry page, leaving transparent bloodstains. The scent of alcohol fills the air, and colorless flames spread everywhere. In that blaze, Horla holds the last poem, silently marking the end of the concealed genius poet's path."

Normally this is a series that provides a 60 s
